case_title: GOLDMAN LORI VS PARK EXPRESS INC.

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO FEB-17-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05 TRIAL OF JAN-10-1994 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SANTA CLARA COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT PARK EXPRESS INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PARK EXPRESS INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $429.35 FILED BY GOLDMAN LORI AS TO DEFENDANT PARK EXPRESS INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-10-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOLDMAN LORI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PARK EXPRESS INC. $429.35 PRINCIPAL, $39.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $468.35 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SANTA CLARA COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $505.65 AS TO DEFENDANT PARK EXPRESS INC.
